Andrey Kutsenko

Software engineer in San Francisco. Automation for fintech — data parsing, document pipelines, ops tooling. After hours: LLM experiments and long runs.

now

  • ⚙️InfoIMAGE — software engineer: data parsing, document pipelines and Unix/Linux automation for fintech.
  • 🤖SimpleProcess.io — building business automation and AI-driven outreach tools.

projects

  • 📊Dashboard — my VS Code-flavored feed reader: Hacker News, GitHub radar, r/LocalLLaMA, LessWrong. Refreshed hourly by a Cloudflare Worker. Press ` in there.
  • 🧾This page — a single HTML file. No frameworks, no analytics, no cookies. View source, it won't bite.

stack

Python · SQL · Shell · TypeScript · Docker · Cloudflare Workers · LLM APIs

off the clock

  • 🏃Marathons — long runs are where the best debugging happens. Splits are on Strava; try run in the terminal below.
